mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.sort_order, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count FROM category c LEFT JOIN product p ON p.category_id = c.id
AND c.status = 1
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.sort_order, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
